title: WV1 3DW, Dunton Environmental Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/BP3331DD/S007
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Dunton Environmental Limited Installation name: Horseley Field Waste Treatment Facility Permit number: EPR/BP3331DD/S007  "
